items.definition_en: A spoon is a tool used for eating or serving food.
items.example_en: I always stir my tea with a spoon.

items.definition_en: A fork is a utensil used for picking up food.
items.example_en: He ate his salad with a fork.

items.definition_en: A knife is a tool used to cut food.
items.example_en: She used a knife to slice bread.

items.definition_en: A ladle is a large, deep spoon for serving liquids.
items.example_en: He used a ladle to serve the soup.

items.definition_en: A whisk is a tool for mixing eggs or cream.
items.example_en: She beat the eggs with a whisk.

items.definition_en: Tongs are a tool for picking up hot food.
items.example_en: He grabbed the sausage with tongs.

items.definition_en: A spatula is a flat tool for turning or mixing food.
items.example_en: Flip the pancakes with a spatula.

items.definition_en: A peeler is a device to remove skin from fruits or vegetables.
items.example_en: He used a peeler to peel the apples.

items.definition_en: A colander is a bowl with holes to drain water from food.
items.example_en: She drained the pasta in a colander.

items.definition_en: A grater is a tool used to shred cheese or vegetables.
items.example_en: He used a grater for the cheese.

items.definition_en: A masher is a tool to crush cooked potatoes or vegetables.
items.example_en: She made mashed potatoes with a masher.

items.definition_en: A rolling pin is a cylinder used to flatten dough.
items.example_en: He rolled the dough with a rolling pin.

items.definition_en: A bottle opener is a tool for opening bottles.
items.example_en: She opened the drink with a bottle opener.

items.definition_en: A can opener is a tool for opening cans.
items.example_en: He used a can opener to open the beans.

items.definition_en: A strainer is a small tool for separating liquids from solids.
items.example_en: She poured the tea through a strainer.

items.definition_en: A measuring cup is used to measure liquids or powders.
items.example_en: Add one measuring cup of milk.

items.definition_en: A slotted spoon lets liquid drain from food when serving.
items.example_en: Take the vegetables out with a slotted spoon.

items.definition_en: A serving fork is a large fork used to serve food.
items.example_en: He picked up the chicken with the serving fork.

items.definition_en: A garlic press is a tool for crushing garlic.
items.example_en: She used a garlic press for the recipe.

items.definition_en: A pastry brush is used to spread butter or egg on food.
items.example_en: He brushed the bread with a pastry brush.
